Idea.title: Idea
Idea.description: An idea captured in the secure vault

description.description: The detailed description of the idea

color.description: Tailwind hex or class prefix for color accents

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the idea was created

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the idea was last updated

isPinned.description: Whether the idea is pinned to the top

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this idea

/ideas/{ideaId}.description: Collection of ideas captured and categorized by users
